response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms and has no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to a brief role at National Instruments unrelated to financial systems, and his entire professional history is centered on web, mobile, and DLang/TypeScript stacks with no SQL Server/Oracle or financial domain work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot programming skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and dev-ops infrastructure
Active open-source contributor and technical educator with clear communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows platform as required
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience is listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle context
